title: Audio Guide API, data, and dev workflow
description: HTTP contract, local UV workflow, Bruno testing, Telegram client, and knowledge-base ingestion in one operator view.

requestFields.runtime: Used as coordinate context for nearby landmark lookups.
Used with lat for Google Maps context.
Decoded and sent into the image-understanding agent.
Accepted by the model, but not used by the live runtime yet.

dataSources.input: Article names or predefined landmark list
dataSources.output: Raw JSON, Gemini-filtered summaries, Chroma wiki_doc records
Scraped text chunks stored as monument records

localTimeline.action: uv sync creates the virtualenv and installs runtime plus dev dependencies.
uv run secrets --pull materializes local .secrets files from Secret Manager.
uv run start --vectorstore starts ChromaDB. This blocking process usually lives in Terminal 1.
uv run start --dev-server starts the local API at http://localhost:8081.
Use Bruno, FastAPI docs, unit tests, or the Telegram bot for end-to-end checks.

testingSurfaces.entrypoint: uv run python -m unittest discover -s tests

operatorGaps.impact: Client intent is collected but ignored by generation.
Production should add per-user or burst control.
--monument always scrapes the hardcoded site root/page flow.
API returns audio_bytes, but bot only sends formatted text.

props.text: This page joins the API contract with the hands-on workflows that keep the backend usable: UV scripts, local ChromaDB, Bruno fixtures, Telegram manual testing, and the manual knowledge-base ingestion pipeline.

props.title: Client and API path
props.description: The public shape is compact; the complexity lives behind the route.

props.title: From test client to playable guide
props.caption: Bruno, cURL, JavaScript, Python, and Telegram all converge on the same POST /retrieve contract.

items.label: client
items.title: Image + coordinates
items.description: Fixture, app upload, or Telegram photo plus lat,long.

items.label: api
items.title: POST /retrieve
items.description: FastAPI validates the body and hands off to the AI pipeline.

items.label: generation
items.title: Grounded response
items.description: ADK agents use Maps and Chroma context before formatting JSON.

items.label: tts
items.title: MP3 response
items.description: Google Cloud TTS returns base64 audio_bytes with the text content.

props.title: Contract, dev, data, and clients
props.description: Tabs keep the four operating views close without burying the details.

props.title: Daily local loop
props.code:
uv sync
uv run secrets --pull

# terminal 1
uv run start --vectorstore

# terminal 2
uv run start --dev-server

# quality
uv run code --check
uv run python -m unittest discover -s tests

props.title: Manual ingestion path
props.caption: There is no automated refresh job in repo code; operators run targeted ingestion commands.

items.label: Wikipedia
items.title: Fetch articles
items.description: Raw article text lands in storage/wiki_raw_landmarks.json.

items.label: Vector store
items.title: Chunk + embed
items.description: --populate stores wiki_doc or monument chunks in ChromaDB.

props.title: Operator gaps
props.description: These are not mysteries. The docs already name them; the visual map keeps them visible.
